---
title: "discourse_particles"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  results = "asis"
)
```
<style>
table {
  width: 100%;
  table-layout: fixed;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

th, td {
  white-space: normal !important;
  word-wrap: break-word;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  vertical-align: top;
  padding: 4px;
}
</style>

```{r}
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(mgcv)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}
discourse_particles <- readRDS(here("ValidationData", "discourse_particles.rds"))
```

TRT: mod_trt <- glmmTMB( TRT ~  AOI.condition + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant), data = discourse_particles, family = Gamma(link = "log"))
FRT: mod_frt <- glmmTMB( FRT ~  AOI.condition + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant), data = discourse_particles, family = Gamma(link = "log"))
RRT: mod_rrt <- glmmTMB( RRT ~ AOI.condition + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant), ziformula = ~ AOI.condition + nLetters, data = discourse_particles, family = ziGamma(link = "log") )

Experiment Por Ello Incluso: 
*TRT: Full Data Fit Probleme - Aggregated*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_fit_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_obs_metric = 0L,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_obs_metric = length(obs),
    rmse_in_sample = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae_in_sample = mean(abs(err)),
    bias_in_sample = mean(err),
    cor_obs_pred = suppressWarnings(stats::cor(obs, pred))
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# TRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_fullfit_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "TRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(TRT), TRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`)
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMEL
# =========================================================

make_formula_discourse_particles <- function(response = "TRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles <- function(df, formula) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_AOI_condition = dplyr::n_distinct(df$`AOI.condition`),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles <- function(df, formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_discourse_particles <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                                 fit_warning_text,
                                                 fit_message_text,
                                                 fit_error,
                                                 fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                                 fit_nonzero_convergence) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_discourse_particles <- function(df_aggr,
                                                  formula,
                                                  exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                  aggr_i) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  n_levels_aoi_condition <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$`AOI.condition`)
  n_levels_topic <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic)
  n_levels_participant <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant)

  if (n_levels_aoi_condition < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
        n_topics = n_levels_topic,
        n_participants = n_levels_participant,
        formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " "),
        X_rank = NA_real_,
        X_ncol = NA_real_,
        fit_rank_deficient = NA,
        redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI_condition = n_levels_aoi_condition,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(df_aggr$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(df_aggr$nLetters),
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "AOI.condition has fewer than 2 levels in full data for this aggr_level",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
        rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
        mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
        bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
        cor_obs_pred = NA_real_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_AOI.condition"
      )
    )
  }

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  fit_metrics <- if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
      predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
      error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df_aggr))
    )

    calc_fit_metrics(
      obs = df_aggr$TRT,
      pred = fitted_vals
    )
  } else {
    tibble(
      n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    )
  }

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = n_levels_topic,
    n_participants = n_levels_participant,
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_metrics) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_discourse_particles(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# FULL-DATA-FITS ÜBER aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_fullfits_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                             exp_name = "discourse_particles") {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_fullfit_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_i <- make_formula_discourse_particles(response = "TRT")

  fullfit_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    fit_one_full_case_discourse_particles(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula = formula_i,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i
    )
  })

  problem_counts <- fullfit_all %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- fullfit_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  list(
    fullfit_all = fullfit_all,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_discourse_particles_fullfit <- run_fullfits_discourse_particles(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles"
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_fullfit$fullfit_all)

#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_fullfit$problem_fits_only)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_fullfit$problem_counts),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```



*TRT: Topic LOO + Fit Probleme*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# TRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_topicloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "TRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(TRT), TRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`)
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMEL
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_discourse_particles <- function(response = "TRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                                      formula) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                    formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# =========================================================

classify_problem_discourse_particles <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                                 fit_warning_text,
                                                 fit_message_text,
                                                 fit_error,
                                                 fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                                 fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                                 prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN TOPIC-LOO-FIT
# =========================================================

fit_one_topicloo_case_discourse_particles <- function(train_df,
                                                      test_df,
                                                      formula,
                                                      exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                      aggr_i,
                                                      topic_i) {
  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$TRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  out <- tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_topic = topic_i,
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_discourse_particles(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )

  out
}

# =========================================================
# TOPIC-LOO FÜR discourse_particles
# über aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_topicloo_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                             exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                             verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_topicloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_discourse_particles(response = "TRT")

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    topics_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Topic))

    purrr::map_dfr(topics_cluster, function(topic_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) != topic_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) == topic_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[Topic-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_topic=", topic_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_topicloo_case_discourse_particles(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula = formula_i,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        topic_i = topic_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_topic)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_discourse_particles_topicloo <- run_topicloo_discourse_particles(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_topicloo$loo_all)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_topicloo$loo_summary)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_topicloo$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_topicloo$problem_fits_only)


knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_topicloo$loo_summary),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```



*TRT: Participant LOO + Fit Probleme*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# TRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_partloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "TRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(TRT), TRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`)
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMEL
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_discourse_particles <- function(response = "TRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                                      formula) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                    formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# =========================================================

classify_problem_discourse_particles <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                                 fit_warning_text,
                                                 fit_message_text,
                                                 fit_error,
                                                 fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                                 fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                                 prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN PARTICIPANT-LOO-FIT
# =========================================================

fit_one_participantloo_case_discourse_particles <- function(train_df,
                                                            test_df,
                                                            formula,
                                                            exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                            aggr_i,
                                                            participant_i) {
  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$TRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  out <- tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_participant = participant_i,
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_discourse_particles(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )

  out
}

# =========================================================
# PARTICIPANT-LOO FÜR discourse_particles
# über aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_participantloo_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                   exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                   verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_partloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_discourse_particles(response = "TRT")

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    participants_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Participant))

    purrr::map_dfr(participants_cluster, function(participant_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) != participant_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) == participant_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[Participant-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_participant=", participant_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_participantloo_case_discourse_particles(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula = formula_i,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        participant_i = participant_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_participant)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_discourse_particles_participantloo <- run_participantloo_discourse_particles(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_participantloo$loo_all)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_participantloo$loo_summary)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_participantloo$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_participantloo$problem_fits_only)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_participantloo$loo_summary),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```



*FRT Full Data Fit Problems*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_fit_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_obs_metric = 0L,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_obs_metric = length(obs),
    rmse_in_sample = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae_in_sample = mean(abs(err)),
    bias_in_sample = mean(err),
    cor_obs_pred = suppressWarnings(stats::cor(obs, pred))
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# FRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_fullfit_data_frt <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "FRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`)
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMEL
# =========================================================

make_formula_discourse_particles_frt <- function(response = "FRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles_frt <- function(df, formula) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_AOI_condition = dplyr::n_distinct(df$`AOI.condition`),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_frt <- function(df, formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_discourse_particles_frt <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                                     fit_warning_text,
                                                     fit_message_text,
                                                     fit_error,
                                                     fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                                     fit_nonzero_convergence) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_discourse_particles_frt <- function(df_aggr,
                                                      formula,
                                                      exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                      aggr_i) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  n_levels_aoi_condition <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$`AOI.condition`)
  n_levels_topic <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic)
  n_levels_participant <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant)

  if (n_levels_aoi_condition < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
        n_topics = n_levels_topic,
        n_participants = n_levels_participant,
        formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " "),
        X_rank = NA_real_,
        X_ncol = NA_real_,
        fit_rank_deficient = NA,
        redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI_condition = n_levels_aoi_condition,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(df_aggr$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(df_aggr$nLetters),
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "AOI.condition has fewer than 2 levels in full data for this aggr_level",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
        rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
        mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
        bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
        cor_obs_pred = NA_real_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_AOI.condition"
      )
    )
  }

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles_frt(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_frt(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  fit_metrics <- if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
      predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
      error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df_aggr))
    )

    calc_fit_metrics(
      obs = df_aggr$FRT,
      pred = fitted_vals
    )
  } else {
    tibble(
      n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    )
  }

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = n_levels_topic,
    n_participants = n_levels_participant,
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_metrics) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_discourse_particles_frt(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# FULL-DATA-FITS ÜBER aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_fullfits_discourse_particles_frt <- function(df,
                                                 exp_name = "discourse_particles") {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_fullfit_data_frt(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_i <- make_formula_discourse_particles_frt(response = "FRT")

  fullfit_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    fit_one_full_case_discourse_particles_frt(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula = formula_i,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i
    )
  })

  problem_counts <- fullfit_all %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- fullfit_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  list(
    fullfit_all = fullfit_all,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_discourse_particles_fullfit_frt <- run_fullfits_discourse_particles_frt(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles"
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_fullfit_frt$fullfit_all)
round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_fullfit_frt$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_fullfit_frt$problem_fits_only)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_fullfit_frt$problem_counts),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```


*FRT: Topic LOO +  Fit Probleme*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# FRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_topicloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "FRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`)
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMEL
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_discourse_particles <- function(response = "FRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                                      formula) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                    formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# =========================================================

classify_problem_discourse_particles <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                                 fit_warning_text,
                                                 fit_message_text,
                                                 fit_error,
                                                 fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                                 fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                                 prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN TOPIC-LOO-FIT
# =========================================================

fit_one_topicloo_case_discourse_particles <- function(train_df,
                                                      test_df,
                                                      formula,
                                                      exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                      aggr_i,
                                                      topic_i) {
  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$FRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  out <- tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_topic = topic_i,
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_discourse_particles(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )

  out
}

# =========================================================
# TOPIC-LOO FÜR discourse_particles
# über aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_topicloo_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                             exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                             verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_topicloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_discourse_particles(response = "FRT")

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    topics_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Topic))

    purrr::map_dfr(topics_cluster, function(topic_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) != topic_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) == topic_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[Topic-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_topic=", topic_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_topicloo_case_discourse_particles(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula = formula_i,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        topic_i = topic_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_topic)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_discourse_particles_topicloo_frt <- run_topicloo_discourse_particles(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_topicloo_frt$loo_all)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_topicloo_frt$loo_summary)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_topicloo_frt$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_topicloo_frt$problem_fits_only)

knitr::kable(
 round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_topicloo_frt$loo_summary),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)


```



*FRT: Participant LOO + Fit Probleme*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# FRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_participantloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "FRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`)
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMEL
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_discourse_particles <- function(response = "FRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                                      formula) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                    formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# =========================================================

classify_problem_discourse_particles <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                                 fit_warning_text,
                                                 fit_message_text,
                                                 fit_error,
                                                 fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                                 fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                                 prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN PARTICIPANT-LOO-FIT
# =========================================================

fit_one_participantloo_case_discourse_particles <- function(train_df,
                                                            test_df,
                                                            formula,
                                                            exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                            aggr_i,
                                                            participant_i) {
  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_discourse_particles(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$FRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  out <- tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_participant = participant_i,
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_discourse_particles(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )

  out
}

# =========================================================
# PARTICIPANT-LOO FÜR discourse_particles
# über aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_participantloo_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                   exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                   verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_participantloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_discourse_particles(response = "FRT")

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    participants_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Participant))

    purrr::map_dfr(participants_cluster, function(participant_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) != participant_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) == participant_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[Participant-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_participant=", participant_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_participantloo_case_discourse_particles(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula = formula_i,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        participant_i = participant_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_participant)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_discourse_particles_participantloo_frt <- run_participantloo_discourse_particles(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_participantloo_frt$loo_all)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_participantloo_frt$loo_summary)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_participantloo_frt$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_participantloo_frt$problem_fits_only)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_participantloo_frt$loo_summary),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```


*RRT: Full Data Fit Probleme*
