```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# RRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_rrt_fullfit_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "RRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(RRT), RRT >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`)
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN
# =========================================================

make_formula_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(response = "RRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

make_ziformula_discourse_particles_rrt <- function() {
  ~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECKS
# getrennt für cond und zi
# =========================================================

inspect_one_matrix <- function(formula, data) {
  mf <- model.frame(formula, data = droplevels(data), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(formula, data = mf)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols)
  )
}

inspect_design_matrices_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df, formula_cond, formula_zi) {
  fixed_cond <- lme4::nobars(formula_cond)

  cond_info <- inspect_one_matrix(fixed_cond, df) %>%
    rename(
      cond_X_rank = X_rank,
      cond_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      cond_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      cond_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  zi_info <- inspect_one_matrix(formula_zi, df) %>%
    rename(
      zi_X_rank = X_rank,
      zi_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      zi_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      zi_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  bind_cols(cond_info, zi_info) %>%
    mutate(
      n_distinct_AOI.condition = dplyr::n_distinct(df$`AOI.condition`),
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
      min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
      max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
    )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df, formula_cond, formula_zi) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula_cond,
        ziformula = formula_zi,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = ziGamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(cond_rank_deficient,
                                                     zi_rank_deficient,
                                                     fit_warning_text,
                                                     fit_message_text,
                                                     fit_error,
                                                     fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                                     fit_nonzero_convergence) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  any_rankdef <- isTRUE(cond_rank_deficient) || isTRUE(zi_rank_deficient)

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    any_rankdef &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    any_rankdef ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df_aggr,
                                                      formula_cond,
                                                      formula_zi,
                                                      exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                      aggr_i) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  n_levels_aoi_condition <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$`AOI.condition`)
  n_levels_topic <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic)
  n_levels_participant <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant)

  if (n_levels_aoi_condition < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
        n_topics = n_levels_topic,
        n_participants = n_levels_participant,
        n_zero = sum(df_aggr$RRT == 0),
        n_positive = sum(df_aggr$RRT > 0),
        prop_zero = mean(df_aggr$RRT == 0),
        cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
        zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " "),
        cond_X_rank = NA_real_,
        cond_X_ncol = NA_real_,
        cond_rank_deficient = NA,
        cond_redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        zi_X_rank = NA_real_,
        zi_X_ncol = NA_real_,
        zi_rank_deficient = NA,
        zi_redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI.condition = n_levels_aoi_condition,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(df_aggr$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(df_aggr$nLetters),
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "AOI.condition has fewer than 2 levels in full data for this aggr_level",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_AOI.condition"
      )
    )
  }

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrices_discourse_particles_rrt(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_rrt(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = n_levels_topic,
    n_participants = n_levels_participant,
    n_zero = sum(df_aggr$RRT == 0),
    n_positive = sum(df_aggr$RRT > 0),
    prop_zero = mean(df_aggr$RRT == 0),
    cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
    zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_discourse_particles_rrt(
        cond_rank_deficient = cond_rank_deficient,
        zi_rank_deficient = zi_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# FULL-DATA-FITS ÜBER aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_fullfits_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df,
                                                 exp_name = "discourse_particles") {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_rrt_fullfit_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_cond <- make_formula_discourse_particles_rrt(response = "RRT")
  formula_zi <- make_ziformula_discourse_particles_rrt()

  fullfit_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    fit_one_full_case_discourse_particles_rrt(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula_cond = formula_cond,
      formula_zi = formula_zi,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i
    )
  })

  problem_counts <- fullfit_all %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- fullfit_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  list(
    fullfit_all = fullfit_all,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_discourse_particles_rrt_fullfit <- run_fullfits_discourse_particles_rrt(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles"
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_fullfit$fullfit_all)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_fullfit$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_fullfit$problem_fits_only)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_fullfit$problem_counts),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```


*RRT: Topic LOO*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Fit und Fehlermetriken auf allen Werten
# Erwartet:
# RRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_rrt_topicloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "RRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(RRT), RRT >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`)
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN
# =========================================================

make_formula_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(response = "RRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

make_ziformula_discourse_particles_rrt <- function() {
  ~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECKS
# getrennt für cond und zi
# =========================================================

inspect_one_matrix <- function(formula, data) {
  mf <- model.frame(formula, data = droplevels(data), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(formula, data = mf)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols)
  )
}

inspect_design_matrices_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df,
                                                            formula_cond,
                                                            formula_zi) {
  fixed_cond <- lme4::nobars(formula_cond)

  cond_info <- inspect_one_matrix(fixed_cond, df) %>%
    rename(
      cond_X_rank = X_rank,
      cond_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      cond_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      cond_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  zi_info <- inspect_one_matrix(formula_zi, df) %>%
    rename(
      zi_X_rank = X_rank,
      zi_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      zi_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      zi_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  bind_cols(cond_info, zi_info) %>%
    mutate(
      n_distinct_AOI.condition = dplyr::n_distinct(df$`AOI.condition`),
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
      min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
      max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters),
      prop_zero = mean(df$RRT == 0),
      n_zero = sum(df$RRT == 0),
      n_positive = sum(df$RRT > 0)
    )
}

# =========================================================
# HEURISTIK FÜR SINGULAR RANDOM EFFECTS IN glmmTMB
# =========================================================

extract_re_variances_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj) {
  vc <- tryCatch(VarCorr(fit_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(vc) || is.null(vc$cond)) return(numeric(0))

  vars <- c()

  for (grp in names(vc$cond)) {
    mat <- vc$cond[[grp]]
    sd_attr <- attr(mat, "stddev")

    if (!is.null(sd_attr) && length(sd_attr) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, as.numeric(sd_attr)^2)
    } else if (is.matrix(mat) && nrow(mat) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, diag(as.matrix(mat)))
    }
  }

  vars
}

check_singular_re_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj, tol = 1e-8) {
  re_vars <- extract_re_variances_glmmtmb(fit_obj)

  if (length(re_vars) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_singular_re = NA,
      n_random_effect_vars = 0L,
      n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
      min_random_effect_var = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    fit_singular_re = any(re_vars < tol),
    n_random_effect_vars = length(re_vars),
    n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = sum(re_vars < tol),
    min_random_effect_var = min(re_vars)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df,
                                                        formula_cond,
                                                        formula_zi) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula_cond,
        ziformula = formula_zi,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = ziGamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  singular_info <- check_singular_re_glmmtmb(fit)

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(singular_info) %>%
      mutate(
        aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

classify_problem_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(cond_rank_deficient,
                                                     zi_rank_deficient,
                                                     fit_warning_text,
                                                     fit_message_text,
                                                     fit_error,
                                                     fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                                     fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                                     fit_singular_re,
                                                     prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  any_rankdef <- isTRUE(cond_rank_deficient) || isTRUE(zi_rank_deficient)

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_singular_re) ~ "singular_random_effects",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    any_rankdef &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    any_rankdef ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_signal_only",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN TOPIC-LOO-FIT
# Vorhersage und Fehlermetriken auf allen Testwerten
# =========================================================

fit_one_topicloo_case_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(train_df,
                                                          test_df,
                                                          formula_cond,
                                                          formula_zi,
                                                          exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                          aggr_i,
                                                          topic_i) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  n_levels_aoi_condition <- dplyr::n_distinct(train_df$`AOI.condition`)

  if (n_levels_aoi_condition < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        heldout_topic = topic_i,
        n_train = nrow(train_df),
        n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
        n_test_zero = sum(test_df$RRT == 0),
        n_test_positive = sum(test_df$RRT > 0),
        cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
        zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " "),
        cond_X_rank = NA_real_,
        cond_X_ncol = NA_real_,
        cond_rank_deficient = NA,
        cond_redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        zi_X_rank = NA_real_,
        zi_X_ncol = NA_real_,
        zi_rank_deficient = NA,
        zi_redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI.condition = n_levels_aoi_condition,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(train_df$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(train_df$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(train_df$nLetters),
        prop_zero = mean(train_df$RRT == 0),
        n_zero = sum(train_df$RRT == 0),
        n_positive = sum(train_df$RRT > 0),
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "AOI.condition has fewer than 2 levels in training fold",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_test = NA_real_,
        rmse = NA_real_,
        mae = NA_real_,
        bias = NA_real_,
        prediction_error = NA_character_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_AOI.condition"
      )
    )
  }

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrices_discourse_particles_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$RRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_topic = topic_i,
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    n_test_zero = sum(test_df$RRT == 0),
    n_test_positive = sum(test_df$RRT > 0),
    cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
    zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_discourse_particles_rrt(
        cond_rank_deficient = cond_rank_deficient,
        zi_rank_deficient = zi_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_singular_re = fit_singular_re,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# TOPIC-LOO FÜR discourse_particles, RRT
# Gesamtbereich inklusive 0ern
# =========================================================

run_topicloo_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df,
                                                 exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                 verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_rrt_topicloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_cond <- make_formula_discourse_particles_rrt(response = "RRT")
  formula_zi <- make_ziformula_discourse_particles_rrt()

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    topics_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Topic))

    purrr::map_dfr(topics_cluster, function(topic_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) != topic_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) == topic_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[RRT Topic-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_topic=", topic_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_topicloo_case_discourse_particles_rrt(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula_cond = formula_cond,
        formula_zi = formula_zi,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        topic_i = topic_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_singular_re = sum(fit_singular_re %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_cond_rank_deficient = sum(cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_zi_rank_deficient = sum(zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_test_zero = sum(n_test_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_test_positive = sum(n_test_positive, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_singular_re %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_topic)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_discourse_particles_rrt_topicloo <- run_topicloo_discourse_particles_rrt(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_topicloo$loo_all)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_topicloo$loo_summary)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_topicloo$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_topicloo$problem_fits_only)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_topicloo$loo_summary),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```


*RRT: Participant LOO*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Fit und Fehlermetriken auf allen Werten
# Erwartet:
# RRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_rrt_participantloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "RRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(RRT), RRT >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`)
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN
# =========================================================

make_formula_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(response = "RRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

make_ziformula_discourse_particles_rrt <- function() {
  ~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECKS
# getrennt für cond und zi
# =========================================================

inspect_one_matrix <- function(formula, data) {
  mf <- model.frame(formula, data = droplevels(data), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(formula, data = mf)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols)
  )
}

inspect_design_matrices_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df,
                                                            formula_cond,
                                                            formula_zi) {
  fixed_cond <- lme4::nobars(formula_cond)

  cond_info <- inspect_one_matrix(fixed_cond, df) %>%
    rename(
      cond_X_rank = X_rank,
      cond_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      cond_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      cond_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  zi_info <- inspect_one_matrix(formula_zi, df) %>%
    rename(
      zi_X_rank = X_rank,
      zi_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      zi_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      zi_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  bind_cols(cond_info, zi_info) %>%
    mutate(
      n_distinct_AOI.condition = dplyr::n_distinct(df$`AOI.condition`),
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
      min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
      max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters),
      prop_zero = mean(df$RRT == 0),
      n_zero = sum(df$RRT == 0),
      n_positive = sum(df$RRT > 0)
    )
}

# =========================================================
# HEURISTIK FÜR SINGULAR RANDOM EFFECTS IN glmmTMB
# =========================================================

extract_re_variances_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj) {
  vc <- tryCatch(VarCorr(fit_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(vc) || is.null(vc$cond)) return(numeric(0))

  vars <- c()

  for (grp in names(vc$cond)) {
    mat <- vc$cond[[grp]]
    sd_attr <- attr(mat, "stddev")

    if (!is.null(sd_attr) && length(sd_attr) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, as.numeric(sd_attr)^2)
    } else if (is.matrix(mat) && nrow(mat) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, diag(as.matrix(mat)))
    }
  }

  vars
}

check_singular_re_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj, tol = 1e-8) {
  re_vars <- extract_re_variances_glmmtmb(fit_obj)

  if (length(re_vars) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_singular_re = NA,
      n_random_effect_vars = 0L,
      n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
      min_random_effect_var = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    fit_singular_re = any(re_vars < tol),
    n_random_effect_vars = length(re_vars),
    n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = sum(re_vars < tol),
    min_random_effect_var = min(re_vars)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df,
                                                        formula_cond,
                                                        formula_zi) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula_cond,
        ziformula = formula_zi,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = ziGamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  singular_info <- check_singular_re_glmmtmb(fit)

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(singular_info) %>%
      mutate(
        aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

classify_problem_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(cond_rank_deficient,
                                                     zi_rank_deficient,
                                                     fit_warning_text,
                                                     fit_message_text,
                                                     fit_error,
                                                     fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                                     fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                                     fit_singular_re,
                                                     prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  any_rankdef <- isTRUE(cond_rank_deficient) || isTRUE(zi_rank_deficient)

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_singular_re) ~ "singular_random_effects",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    any_rankdef &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    any_rankdef ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_signal_only",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN PARTICIPANT-LOO-FIT
# Vorhersage und Fehlermetriken auf allen Testwerten
# =========================================================

fit_one_participantloo_case_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(train_df,
                                                                test_df,
                                                                formula_cond,
                                                                formula_zi,
                                                                exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                                aggr_i,
                                                                participant_i) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  n_levels_aoi_condition <- dplyr::n_distinct(train_df$`AOI.condition`)

  if (n_levels_aoi_condition < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        heldout_participant = participant_i,
        n_train = nrow(train_df),
        n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
        n_test_zero = sum(test_df$RRT == 0),
        n_test_positive = sum(test_df$RRT > 0),
        cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
        zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " "),
        cond_X_rank = NA_real_,
        cond_X_ncol = NA_real_,
        cond_rank_deficient = NA,
        cond_redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        zi_X_rank = NA_real_,
        zi_X_ncol = NA_real_,
        zi_rank_deficient = NA,
        zi_redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI.condition = n_levels_aoi_condition,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(train_df$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(train_df$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(train_df$nLetters),
        prop_zero = mean(train_df$RRT == 0),
        n_zero = sum(train_df$RRT == 0),
        n_positive = sum(train_df$RRT > 0),
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "AOI.condition has fewer than 2 levels in training fold",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_test = NA_real_,
        rmse = NA_real_,
        mae = NA_real_,
        bias = NA_real_,
        prediction_error = NA_character_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_AOI.condition"
      )
    )
  }

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrices_discourse_particles_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$RRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_participant = participant_i,
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    n_test_zero = sum(test_df$RRT == 0),
    n_test_positive = sum(test_df$RRT > 0),
    cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
    zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_discourse_particles_rrt(
        cond_rank_deficient = cond_rank_deficient,
        zi_rank_deficient = zi_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_singular_re = fit_singular_re,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# PARTICIPANT-LOO FÜR discourse_particles, RRT
# Gesamtbereich inklusive 0ern
# =========================================================

run_participantloo_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df,
                                                       exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                       verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_rrt_participantloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_cond <- make_formula_discourse_particles_rrt(response = "RRT")
  formula_zi <- make_ziformula_discourse_particles_rrt()

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    participants_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Participant))

    purrr::map_dfr(participants_cluster, function(participant_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) != participant_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) == participant_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[RRT Participant-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_participant=", participant_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_participantloo_case_discourse_particles_rrt(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula_cond = formula_cond,
        formula_zi = formula_zi,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        participant_i = participant_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_singular_re = sum(fit_singular_re %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_cond_rank_deficient = sum(cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_zi_rank_deficient = sum(zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_test_zero = sum(n_test_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_test_positive = sum(n_test_positive, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_singular_re %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_participant)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_discourse_particles_rrt_participantloo <- run_participantloo_discourse_particles_rrt(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_participantloo$loo_all)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_participantloo$loo_summary)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_participantloo$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_participantloo$problem_fits_only)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_participantloo$loo_summary),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```



*RRT Participant LOO 0er Analyse*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

safe_div <- function(num, den) {
  ifelse(is.na(den) | den == 0, NA_real_, num / den)
}

calc_zero_metrics <- function(obs_zero, pred_prob_zero, threshold = 0.5) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs_zero) & is.finite(pred_prob_zero)
  obs_zero <- obs_zero[keep]
  pred_prob_zero <- pred_prob_zero[keep]

  if (length(obs_zero) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_eval = 0L,
      threshold = threshold,
      observed_zero_rate = NA_real_,
      mean_pred_zero_prob = NA_real_,
      calibration_gap = NA_real_,
      brier_zero = NA_real_,
      accuracy = NA_real_,
      balanced_accuracy = NA_real_,
      recall_zero = NA_real_,
      recall_positive = NA_real_,
      precision_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_positive = NA_real_,
      TP_zero = NA_real_,
      TN_positive = NA_real_,
      FP_zero = NA_real_,
      FN_zero = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  pred_zero_class <- pred_prob_zero >= threshold

  TP <- sum(pred_zero_class & obs_zero)
  TN <- sum(!pred_zero_class & !obs_zero)
  FP <- sum(pred_zero_class & !obs_zero)
  FN <- sum(!pred_zero_class & obs_zero)

  recall_zero <- safe_div(TP, TP + FN)
  recall_positive <- safe_div(TN, TN + FP)
  precision_zero <- safe_div(TP, TP + FP)
  accuracy <- safe_div(TP + TN, length(obs_zero))

  balanced_accuracy <- if (all(is.na(c(recall_zero, recall_positive)))) {
    NA_real_
  } else {
    mean(c(recall_zero, recall_positive), na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  observed_zero_rate <- mean(obs_zero)
  mean_pred_zero_prob <- mean(pred_prob_zero)

  tibble(
    n_eval = length(obs_zero),
    threshold = threshold,
    observed_zero_rate = observed_zero_rate,
    mean_pred_zero_prob = mean_pred_zero_prob,
    calibration_gap = mean_pred_zero_prob - observed_zero_rate,
    brier_zero = mean((pred_prob_zero - as.numeric(obs_zero))^2),
    accuracy = accuracy,
    balanced_accuracy = balanced_accuracy,
    recall_zero = recall_zero,
    recall_positive = recall_positive,
    precision_zero = precision_zero,
    n_pred_zero = sum(pred_zero_class),
    n_pred_positive = sum(!pred_zero_class),
    TP_zero = TP,
    TN_positive = TN,
    FP_zero = FP,
    FN_zero = FN
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# RRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_participantloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "RRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(RRT), RRT >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`),
      is_zero = RRT == 0
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN
# =========================================================

make_formula_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(response = "RRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

make_ziformula_discourse_particles_rrt <- function() {
  ~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECKS
# =========================================================

inspect_one_matrix <- function(formula, data) {
  mf <- model.frame(formula, data = droplevels(data), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(formula, data = mf)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols)
  )
}

inspect_design_matrices_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df, formula_cond, formula_zi) {
  fixed_cond <- lme4::nobars(formula_cond)

  cond_info <- inspect_one_matrix(fixed_cond, df) %>%
    rename(
      cond_X_rank = X_rank,
      cond_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      cond_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      cond_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  zi_info <- inspect_one_matrix(formula_zi, df) %>%
    rename(
      zi_X_rank = X_rank,
      zi_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      zi_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      zi_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  bind_cols(cond_info, zi_info) %>%
    mutate(
      n_distinct_AOI.condition = dplyr::n_distinct(df$`AOI.condition`),
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
      min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
      max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
    )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df, formula_cond, formula_zi) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula_cond,
        ziformula = formula_zi,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = ziGamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# NULLWAHRSCHEINLICHKEIT
# =========================================================

predict_prob_zero <- function(fit_obj, newdata) {
  predict(
    fit_obj,
    newdata = newdata,
    type = "zprob",
    re.form = NULL,
    allow.new.levels = TRUE
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(cond_rank_deficient,
                                                     zi_rank_deficient,
                                                     fit_warning_text,
                                                     fit_message_text,
                                                     fit_error,
                                                     fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                                     fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                                     prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  any_rankdef <- isTRUE(cond_rank_deficient) || isTRUE(zi_rank_deficient)

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    any_rankdef &&
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    any_rankdef ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN PARTICIPANT-LOO-FIT
# 0-Analyse
# =========================================================

fit_one_participantloo_case_discourse_particles_rrt_zero <- function(train_df,
                                                                     test_df,
                                                                     formula_cond,
                                                                     formula_zi,
                                                                     exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                                     aggr_i,
                                                                     participant_i,
                                                                     threshold = 0.5) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  n_levels_aoi_condition <- dplyr::n_distinct(train_df$`AOI.condition`)

  if (n_levels_aoi_condition < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        heldout_participant = participant_i,
        n_train = nrow(train_df),
        n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
        n_test_zero = sum(test_df$is_zero),
        n_test_positive = sum(!test_df$is_zero),
        cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
        zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " "),
        cond_X_rank = NA_real_,
        cond_X_ncol = NA_real_,
        cond_rank_deficient = NA,
        cond_redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        zi_X_rank = NA_real_,
        zi_X_ncol = NA_real_,
        zi_rank_deficient = NA,
        zi_redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI.condition = n_levels_aoi_condition,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(train_df$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(train_df$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(train_df$nLetters),
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "AOI.condition has fewer than 2 levels in training fold",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_eval = NA_real_,
        threshold = threshold,
        observed_zero_rate = NA_real_,
        mean_pred_zero_prob = NA_real_,
        calibration_gap = NA_real_,
        brier_zero = NA_real_,
        accuracy = NA_real_,
        balanced_accuracy = NA_real_,
        recall_zero = NA_real_,
        recall_positive = NA_real_,
        precision_zero = NA_real_,
        n_pred_zero = NA_real_,
        n_pred_positive = NA_real_,
        TP_zero = NA_real_,
        TN_positive = NA_real_,
        FP_zero = NA_real_,
        FN_zero = NA_real_,
        prediction_error = NA_character_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_AOI.condition"
      )
    )
  }

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrices_discourse_particles_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_

  zero_metrics <- if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred_prob_zero <- tryCatch(
      predict_prob_zero(fit_obj, test_df),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )

    calc_zero_metrics(
      obs_zero = test_df$is_zero,
      pred_prob_zero = pred_prob_zero,
      threshold = threshold
    )
  } else {
    tibble(
      n_eval = NA_real_,
      threshold = threshold,
      observed_zero_rate = NA_real_,
      mean_pred_zero_prob = NA_real_,
      calibration_gap = NA_real_,
      brier_zero = NA_real_,
      accuracy = NA_real_,
      balanced_accuracy = NA_real_,
      recall_zero = NA_real_,
      recall_positive = NA_real_,
      precision_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_positive = NA_real_,
      TP_zero = NA_real_,
      TN_positive = NA_real_,
      FP_zero = NA_real_,
      FN_zero = NA_real_
    )
  }

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_participant = participant_i,
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    n_test_zero = sum(test_df$is_zero),
    n_test_positive = sum(!test_df$is_zero),
    cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
    zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(zero_metrics) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_discourse_particles_rrt(
        cond_rank_deficient = cond_rank_deficient,
        zi_rank_deficient = zi_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# PARTICIPANT-LOO FÜR 0-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

run_participantloo_discourse_particles_rrt_zero <- function(df,
                                                            exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                            threshold = 0.5,
                                                            verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_participantloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_cond <- make_formula_discourse_particles_rrt(response = "RRT")
  formula_zi <- make_ziformula_discourse_particles_rrt()

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    participants_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Participant))

    purrr::map_dfr(participants_cluster, function(participant_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) != participant_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) == participant_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[RRT zero Participant-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_participant=", participant_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_participantloo_case_discourse_particles_rrt_zero(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula_cond = formula_cond,
        formula_zi = formula_zi,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        participant_i = participant_i,
        threshold = threshold
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_cond_rank_deficient = sum(cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_zi_rank_deficient = sum(zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_n_eval = sum(n_eval, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_observed_zero_rate = mean(observed_zero_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_pred_zero_prob = mean(mean_pred_zero_prob, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_calibration_gap = mean(calibration_gap, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_brier_zero = mean(brier_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_balanced_accuracy = mean(balanced_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_recall_zero = mean(recall_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_recall_positive = mean(recall_positive, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_precision_zero = mean(precision_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_participant)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_participantloo <- run_participantloo_discourse_particles_rrt_zero(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles",
  threshold = 0.5,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_participantloo$loo_all)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_participantloo$loo_summary)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_participantloo$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_participantloo$problem_fits_only)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_participantloo$loo_summary),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```


*RRT 0er: Topic LOO*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

safe_div <- function(num, den) {
  ifelse(is.na(den) | den == 0, NA_real_, num / den)
}

calc_zero_metrics <- function(obs_zero, pred_prob_zero, threshold = 0.5) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs_zero) & is.finite(pred_prob_zero)
  obs_zero <- obs_zero[keep]
  pred_prob_zero <- pred_prob_zero[keep]

  if (length(obs_zero) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_eval = 0L,
      threshold = threshold,
      observed_zero_rate = NA_real_,
      mean_pred_zero_prob = NA_real_,
      calibration_gap = NA_real_,
      brier_zero = NA_real_,
      accuracy = NA_real_,
      balanced_accuracy = NA_real_,
      recall_zero = NA_real_,
      recall_positive = NA_real_,
      precision_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_positive = NA_real_,
      TP_zero = NA_real_,
      TN_positive = NA_real_,
      FP_zero = NA_real_,
      FN_zero = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  pred_zero_class <- pred_prob_zero >= threshold

  TP <- sum(pred_zero_class & obs_zero)
  TN <- sum(!pred_zero_class & !obs_zero)
  FP <- sum(pred_zero_class & !obs_zero)
  FN <- sum(!pred_zero_class & obs_zero)

  recall_zero <- safe_div(TP, TP + FN)
  recall_positive <- safe_div(TN, TN + FP)
  precision_zero <- safe_div(TP, TP + FP)
  accuracy <- safe_div(TP + TN, length(obs_zero))

  balanced_accuracy <- if (all(is.na(c(recall_zero, recall_positive)))) {
    NA_real_
  } else {
    mean(c(recall_zero, recall_positive), na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  observed_zero_rate <- mean(obs_zero)
  mean_pred_zero_prob <- mean(pred_prob_zero)

  tibble(
    n_eval = length(obs_zero),
    threshold = threshold,
    observed_zero_rate = observed_zero_rate,
    mean_pred_zero_prob = mean_pred_zero_prob,
    calibration_gap = mean_pred_zero_prob - observed_zero_rate,
    brier_zero = mean((pred_prob_zero - as.numeric(obs_zero))^2),
    accuracy = accuracy,
    balanced_accuracy = balanced_accuracy,
    recall_zero = recall_zero,
    recall_positive = recall_positive,
    precision_zero = precision_zero,
    n_pred_zero = sum(pred_zero_class),
    n_pred_positive = sum(!pred_zero_class),
    TP_zero = TP,
    TN_positive = TN,
    FP_zero = FP,
    FN_zero = FN
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# RRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_topicloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "RRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(RRT), RRT >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`),
      is_zero = RRT == 0
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN
# =========================================================

make_formula_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(response = "RRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

make_ziformula_discourse_particles_rrt <- function() {
  ~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECKS
# =========================================================

inspect_one_matrix <- function(formula, data) {
  mf <- model.frame(formula, data = droplevels(data), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(formula, data = mf)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols)
  )
}

inspect_design_matrices_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df, formula_cond, formula_zi) {
  fixed_cond <- lme4::nobars(formula_cond)

  cond_info <- inspect_one_matrix(fixed_cond, df) %>%
    rename(
      cond_X_rank = X_rank,
      cond_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      cond_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      cond_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  zi_info <- inspect_one_matrix(formula_zi, df) %>%
    rename(
      zi_X_rank = X_rank,
      zi_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      zi_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      zi_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  bind_cols(cond_info, zi_info) %>%
    mutate(
      n_distinct_AOI.condition = dplyr::n_distinct(df$`AOI.condition`),
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
      min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
      max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
    )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(df, formula_cond, formula_zi) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula_cond,
        ziformula = formula_zi,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = ziGamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# NULLWAHRSCHEINLICHKEIT
# =========================================================

predict_prob_zero <- function(fit_obj, newdata) {
  predict(
    fit_obj,
    newdata = newdata,
    type = "zprob",
    re.form = NULL,
    allow.new.levels = TRUE
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_discourse_particles_rrt <- function(cond_rank_deficient,
```
