```{r}
                                                     zi_rank_deficient,
                                                     fit_warning_text,
                                                     fit_message_text,
                                                     fit_error,
                                                     fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                                     fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                                     prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  any_rankdef <- isTRUE(cond_rank_deficient) || isTRUE(zi_rank_deficient)

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    any_rankdef &&
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    any_rankdef ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN TOPIC-LOO-FIT
# 0-Analyse
# =========================================================

fit_one_topicloo_case_discourse_particles_rrt_zero <- function(train_df,
                                                               test_df,
                                                               formula_cond,
                                                               formula_zi,
                                                               exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                               aggr_i,
                                                               topic_i,
                                                               threshold = 0.5) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  n_levels_aoi_condition <- dplyr::n_distinct(train_df$`AOI.condition`)

  if (n_levels_aoi_condition < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        heldout_topic = topic_i,
        n_train = nrow(train_df),
        n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
        n_test_zero = sum(test_df$is_zero),
        n_test_positive = sum(!test_df$is_zero),
        cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
        zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " "),
        cond_X_rank = NA_real_,
        cond_X_ncol = NA_real_,
        cond_rank_deficient = NA,
        cond_redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        zi_X_rank = NA_real_,
        zi_X_ncol = NA_real_,
        zi_rank_deficient = NA,
        zi_redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI.condition = n_levels_aoi_condition,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(train_df$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(train_df$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(train_df$nLetters),
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "AOI.condition has fewer than 2 levels in training fold",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_eval = NA_real_,
        threshold = threshold,
        observed_zero_rate = NA_real_,
        mean_pred_zero_prob = NA_real_,
        calibration_gap = NA_real_,
        brier_zero = NA_real_,
        accuracy = NA_real_,
        balanced_accuracy = NA_real_,
        recall_zero = NA_real_,
        recall_positive = NA_real_,
        precision_zero = NA_real_,
        n_pred_zero = NA_real_,
        n_pred_positive = NA_real_,
        TP_zero = NA_real_,
        TN_positive = NA_real_,
        FP_zero = NA_real_,
        FN_zero = NA_real_,
        prediction_error = NA_character_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_AOI.condition"
      )
    )
  }

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrices_discourse_particles_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_discourse_particles_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_

  zero_metrics <- if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred_prob_zero <- tryCatch(
      predict_prob_zero(fit_obj, test_df),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )

    calc_zero_metrics(
      obs_zero = test_df$is_zero,
      pred_prob_zero = pred_prob_zero,
      threshold = threshold
    )
  } else {
    tibble(
      n_eval = NA_real_,
      threshold = threshold,
      observed_zero_rate = NA_real_,
      mean_pred_zero_prob = NA_real_,
      calibration_gap = NA_real_,
      brier_zero = NA_real_,
      accuracy = NA_real_,
      balanced_accuracy = NA_real_,
      recall_zero = NA_real_,
      recall_positive = NA_real_,
      precision_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_positive = NA_real_,
      TP_zero = NA_real_,
      TN_positive = NA_real_,
      FP_zero = NA_real_,
      FN_zero = NA_real_
    )
  }

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_topic = topic_i,
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    n_test_zero = sum(test_df$is_zero),
    n_test_positive = sum(!test_df$is_zero),
    cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
    zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(zero_metrics) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_discourse_particles_rrt(
        cond_rank_deficient = cond_rank_deficient,
        zi_rank_deficient = zi_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# TOPIC-LOO FÜR 0-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

run_topicloo_discourse_particles_rrt_zero <- function(df,
                                                      exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                      threshold = 0.5,
                                                      verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_topicloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_cond <- make_formula_discourse_particles_rrt(response = "RRT")
  formula_zi <- make_ziformula_discourse_particles_rrt()

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    topics_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Topic))

    purrr::map_dfr(topics_cluster, function(topic_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) != topic_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) == topic_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[RRT zero Topic-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_topic=", topic_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_topicloo_case_discourse_particles_rrt_zero(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula_cond = formula_cond,
        formula_zi = formula_zi,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        topic_i = topic_i,
        threshold = threshold
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_cond_rank_deficient = sum(cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_zi_rank_deficient = sum(zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_n_eval = sum(n_eval, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_observed_zero_rate = mean(observed_zero_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_pred_zero_prob = mean(mean_pred_zero_prob, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_calibration_gap = mean(calibration_gap, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_brier_zero = mean(brier_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_balanced_accuracy = mean(balanced_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_recall_zero = mean(recall_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_recall_positive = mean(recall_positive, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_precision_zero = mean(precision_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_topic)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_topicloo <- run_topicloo_discourse_particles_rrt_zero(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles",
  threshold = 0.5,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_topicloo$loo_all)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_topicloo$loo_summary)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_topicloo$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_topicloo$problem_fits_only)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_discourse_particles_rrt_zero_topicloo$loo_summary),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```




**Residualanalyse**






*TRT: DHARMa*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)
library(DHARMa)
library(ggplot2)

# =========================================================
# SETTINGS
# =========================================================

set.seed(123)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

safe_cor <- function(x, y) {
  keep <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
  x <- x[keep]
  y <- y[keep]

  if (length(x) < 3) return(NA_real_)
  suppressWarnings(stats::cor(x, y))
}

safe_test_p <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("p.value" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  p <- test_obj$p.value
  if (is.null(p) || length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(p[1])
}

safe_test_stat <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("statistic" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  s <- test_obj$statistic
  if (is.null(s) || length(s) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(s[1])
}

safe_kruskal_test <- function(residual, group) {
  keep <- is.finite(residual) & !is.na(group)
  residual <- residual[keep]
  group <- group[keep]

  if (length(residual) == 0) return(NULL)
  if (length(unique(group)) < 2) return(NULL)

  tryCatch(
    kruskal.test(residual ~ group),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# TRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_trt_residual_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "TRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(TRT), TRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`)
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMEL
# =========================================================

make_formula_discourse_particles_trt <- function(response = "TRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT MIT FEHLER- UND WARNING-CATCHING
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_trt <- function(df, formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DHARMa-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

analyse_dharma_trt <- function(fit_obj, df, nsim = 2000) {
  simres <- DHARMa::simulateResiduals(
    fittedModel = fit_obj,
    n = nsim,
    plot = FALSE
  )

  dharma_res <- simres$scaledResiduals
  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
  )

  uniform_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testUniformity(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  dispersion_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testDispersion(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  outlier_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testOutliers(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_dharma <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = df$`AOI.condition`),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_kruskal <- safe_kruskal_test(
    residual = dharma_res,
    group = df$`AOI.condition`
  )

  quantiles_warn <- character()
  quantiles_test <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testQuantiles(simres, predictor = df$nLetters),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      quantiles_warn <<- c(quantiles_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  quantiles_error <- if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(quantiles_test)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    quantiles_test <- NULL
  }

  categorical_warn <- character()
  categorical_test_dharma2 <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = df$`AOI.condition`),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      categorical_warn <<- c(categorical_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  categorical_error <- if (inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(categorical_test_dharma2)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (!inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    categorical_test_dharma <- categorical_test_dharma2
  }

  dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_dharma)
  dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_dharma)

  if (is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && !is.null(categorical_test_kruskal)) {
    dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_kruskal)
    dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_kruskal)
  }

  residual_summary <- tibble(
    n_obs_residuals = nrow(df),
    residual_mean = mean(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_median = median(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_sd = stats::sd(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_min = min(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_max = max(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_lt_0_05 = mean(dharma_res < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_gt_0_95 = mean(dharma_res > 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    cor_resid_fitted = safe_cor(dharma_res, fitted_vals),
    cor_resid_nLetters = safe_cor(dharma_res, df$nLetters),
    dharma_uniformity_stat = safe_test_stat(uniform_test),
    dharma_uniformity_p = safe_test_p(uniform_test),
    dharma_dispersion_stat = safe_test_stat(dispersion_test),
    dharma_dispersion_p = safe_test_p(dispersion_test),
    dharma_outlier_stat = safe_test_stat(outlier_test),
    dharma_outlier_p = safe_test_p(outlier_test),
    dharma_categorical_stat = dharma_categorical_stat,
    dharma_categorical_p = dharma_categorical_p,
    dharma_quantiles_stat = safe_test_stat(quantiles_test),
    dharma_quantiles_p = safe_test_p(quantiles_test),
    dharma_categorical_warning = collapse_unique(categorical_warn),
    dharma_categorical_error = categorical_error,
    dharma_quantiles_warning = collapse_unique(quantiles_warn),
    dharma_quantiles_error = quantiles_error
  )

  plot_data <- tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = dharma_res,
    nLetters = df$nLetters,
    observed = df$TRT
  )

  list(
    simres = simres,
    residual_summary = residual_summary,
    plot_data = plot_data,
    tests = list(
      uniform_test = uniform_test,
      dispersion_test = dispersion_test,
      outlier_test = outlier_test,
      categorical_test_dharma = categorical_test_dharma,
      categorical_test_kruskal = categorical_test_kruskal,
      quantiles_test = quantiles_test
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_trt_residual <- function(fit_ok,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          dharma_uniformity_p,
                                          dharma_dispersion_p,
                                          dharma_outlier_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_p,
                                          dharma_quantiles_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_warning,
                                          dharma_quantiles_warning,
                                          dharma_categorical_error,
                                          dharma_quantiles_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(
      fit_error,
      fit_warning_text,
      dharma_categorical_warning,
      dharma_quantiles_warning,
      dharma_categorical_error,
      dharma_quantiles_error
    ),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !isTRUE(fit_ok) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_outlier_p) && dharma_outlier_p < 0.05 ~
      "outlier_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_quantiles_p) && dharma_quantiles_p < 0.05 ~
      "quantiles_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("outer Newton did not converge fully|step failure", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "diagnostic_test_warning",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficiency_signal",
    !is.na(fit_warning_text) ~ "warning_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PLOTFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

plot_trt_residuals_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] TRT Residuals vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_trt_residuals_vs_nLetters <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = nLetters, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] TRT Residuals vs nLetters | ", aggr_label),
      x = "nLetters",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_trt_observed_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = observed)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] TRT Observed vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "Observed TRT"
    )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_discourse_particles_trt_residual <- function(df_aggr,
                                                               formula,
                                                               exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                               aggr_i,
                                                               nsim = 2000) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_trt(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  if (is.null(fit_obj)) {
    summary_tbl <- tibble(
      experiment = exp_name,
      aggr_level = aggr_i,
      n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
      n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
      n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
      n_AOI_condition = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$`AOI.condition`),
      formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
      mutate(
        n_obs_residuals = NA_real_,
        residual_mean = NA_real_,
        residual_median = NA_real_,
        residual_sd = NA_real_,
        residual_min = NA_real_,
        residual_max = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_lt_0_05 = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_gt_0_95 = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_fitted = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_nLetters = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_categorical_error = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_error = NA_character_,
        problem_type = "fit_error"
      )

    return(list(
      summary_tbl = summary_tbl,
      simres = NULL,
      plot_data = NULL,
      tests = NULL
    ))
  }

  dharma_res <- analyse_dharma_trt(
    fit_obj = fit_obj,
    df = df_aggr,
    nsim = nsim
  )

  summary_tbl <- tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
    n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
    n_AOI_condition = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$`AOI.condition`),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(dharma_res$residual_summary) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_trt_residual(
        fit_ok = fit_ok,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        dharma_uniformity_p = dharma_uniformity_p,
        dharma_dispersion_p = dharma_dispersion_p,
        dharma_outlier_p = dharma_outlier_p,
        dharma_categorical_p = dharma_categorical_p,
        dharma_quantiles_p = dharma_quantiles_p,
        dharma_categorical_warning = dharma_categorical_warning,
        dharma_quantiles_warning = dharma_quantiles_warning,
        dharma_categorical_error = dharma_categorical_error,
        dharma_quantiles_error = dharma_quantiles_error
      )
    )

  list(
    summary_tbl = summary_tbl,
    simres = dharma_res$simres,
    plot_data = dharma_res$plot_data,
    tests = dharma_res$tests
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUTOMATISCHE PLOTAUSGABE
# =========================================================

print_all_trt_residual_plots <- function(res_obj) {
  aggr_levels <- names(res_obj$plot_data_list)

  for (i in seq_along(aggr_levels)) {
    aggr_i <- aggr_levels[i]
    plot_data <- res_obj$plot_data_list[[aggr_i]]
    simres <- res_obj$simres_list[[aggr_i]]

    if (is.null(plot_data) || is.null(simres)) next

    print(plot_trt_residuals_vs_fitted(plot_data, aggr_i, 1))
    print(plot_trt_residuals_vs_nLetters(plot_data, aggr_i, 2))
    print(plot_trt_observed_vs_fitted(plot_data, aggr_i, 3))

    graphics::plot(simres)
    graphics::mtext(
      text = paste0("[4/4] Standard DHARMa Plot | ", aggr_i),
      side = 3,
      line = 1,
      cex = 1.1,
      font = 2
    )
  }
}

# =========================================================
# HAUPTFUNKTION
# =========================================================

run_trt_residual_analysis_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                          exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                          nsim = 2000,
                                                          print_plots = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_trt_residual_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_i <- make_formula_discourse_particles_trt(response = "TRT")

  res_list <- purrr::map(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    fit_one_full_case_discourse_particles_trt_residual(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula = formula_i,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i,
      nsim = nsim
    )
  })

  names(res_list) <- aggr_levels

  residual_summary <- purrr::map_dfr(res_list, "summary_tbl")

  problem_counts <- residual_summary %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- residual_summary %>%
    filter(problem_type != "none") %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  plot_data_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "plot_data")
  simres_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "simres")
  tests_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "tests")

  out <- list(
    residual_summary = residual_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only,
    plot_data_list = plot_data_list,
    simres_list = simres_list,
    tests_list = tests_list,
    raw_results = res_list
  )

  if (isTRUE(print_plots)) {
    print_all_trt_residual_plots(out)
  }

  out
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_trt_residuals <- run_trt_residual_analysis_discourse_particles(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles",
  nsim = 2000,
  print_plots = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# TABELLEN
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_trt_residuals$residual_summary)
#round_df_4(res_trt_residuals$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_trt_residuals$problem_fits_only)


knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_trt_residuals$problem_counts),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)

tab <-  round_df_4(res_trt_residuals$residual_summary) %>% select(- formula)


print_split_table <- function(tab, id_cols = 1:3, chunk_size = 6, font_size = 8) {
  id_names <- names(tab)[id_cols]
  other_names <- names(tab)[-id_cols]

  split_index <- ceiling(seq_along(other_names) / chunk_size)
  groups <- split(other_names, split_index)

  for (i in seq_along(groups)) {
    cols_i <- c(id_names, groups[[i]])
    tab_i <- tab[, cols_i, drop = FALSE]

    print(
      knitr::kable(
        tab_i,
        format = "html",
        escape = FALSE
      ) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, font_size = font_size)
    )

    cat("<br><br>")
  }
}
print_split_table(tab)
```


*FRT DHARMa*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)
library(DHARMa)
library(ggplot2)

# =========================================================
# SETTINGS
# =========================================================

set.seed(123)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

safe_cor <- function(x, y) {
  keep <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
  x <- x[keep]
  y <- y[keep]

  if (length(x) < 3) return(NA_real_)
  suppressWarnings(stats::cor(x, y))
}

safe_test_p <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("p.value" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  p <- test_obj$p.value
  if (is.null(p) || length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(p[1])
}

safe_test_stat <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("statistic" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  s <- test_obj$statistic
  if (is.null(s) || length(s) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(s[1])
}

safe_kruskal_test <- function(residual, group) {
  keep <- is.finite(residual) & !is.na(group)
  residual <- residual[keep]
  group <- group[keep]

  if (length(residual) == 0) return(NULL)
  if (length(unique(group)) < 2) return(NULL)

  tryCatch(
    kruskal.test(residual ~ group),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# FRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level, AOI.condition
# =========================================================

prep_discourse_particles_frt_residual_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "FRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level", "AOI.condition"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level), !is.na(`AOI.condition`)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      `AOI.condition` = factor(`AOI.condition`)
    )

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMEL
# =========================================================

make_formula_discourse_particles_frt <- function(response = "FRT") {
  as.formula(
    paste(
      response,
      "~ `AOI.condition` + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT MIT FEHLER- UND WARNING-CATCHING
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_frt <- function(df, formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DHARMa-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

analyse_dharma_frt <- function(fit_obj, df, nsim = 2000) {
  simres <- DHARMa::simulateResiduals(
    fittedModel = fit_obj,
    n = nsim,
    plot = FALSE
  )

  dharma_res <- simres$scaledResiduals
  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
  )

  uniform_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testUniformity(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  dispersion_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testDispersion(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  outlier_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testOutliers(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_dharma <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = df$`AOI.condition`),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_kruskal <- safe_kruskal_test(
    residual = dharma_res,
    group = df$`AOI.condition`
  )

  quantiles_warn <- character()
  quantiles_test <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testQuantiles(simres, predictor = df$nLetters),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      quantiles_warn <<- c(quantiles_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  quantiles_error <- if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(quantiles_test)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    quantiles_test <- NULL
  }

  categorical_warn <- character()
  categorical_test_dharma2 <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = df$`AOI.condition`),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      categorical_warn <<- c(categorical_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  categorical_error <- if (inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(categorical_test_dharma2)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (!inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    categorical_test_dharma <- categorical_test_dharma2
  }

  dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_dharma)
  dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_dharma)

  if (is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && !is.null(categorical_test_kruskal)) {
    dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_kruskal)
    dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_kruskal)
  }

  residual_summary <- tibble(
    n_obs_residuals = nrow(df),
    residual_mean = mean(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_median = median(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_sd = stats::sd(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_min = min(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_max = max(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_lt_0_05 = mean(dharma_res < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_gt_0_95 = mean(dharma_res > 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    cor_resid_fitted = safe_cor(dharma_res, fitted_vals),
    cor_resid_nLetters = safe_cor(dharma_res, df$nLetters),
    dharma_uniformity_stat = safe_test_stat(uniform_test),
    dharma_uniformity_p = safe_test_p(uniform_test),
    dharma_dispersion_stat = safe_test_stat(dispersion_test),
    dharma_dispersion_p = safe_test_p(dispersion_test),
    dharma_outlier_stat = safe_test_stat(outlier_test),
    dharma_outlier_p = safe_test_p(outlier_test),
    dharma_categorical_stat = dharma_categorical_stat,
    dharma_categorical_p = dharma_categorical_p,
    dharma_quantiles_stat = safe_test_stat(quantiles_test),
    dharma_quantiles_p = safe_test_p(quantiles_test),
    dharma_categorical_warning = collapse_unique(categorical_warn),
    dharma_categorical_error = categorical_error,
    dharma_quantiles_warning = collapse_unique(quantiles_warn),
    dharma_quantiles_error = quantiles_error
  )

  plot_data <- tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = dharma_res,
    nLetters = df$nLetters,
    observed = df$FRT
  )

  list(
    simres = simres,
    residual_summary = residual_summary,
    plot_data = plot_data,
    tests = list(
      uniform_test = uniform_test,
      dispersion_test = dispersion_test,
      outlier_test = outlier_test,
      categorical_test_dharma = categorical_test_dharma,
      categorical_test_kruskal = categorical_test_kruskal,
      quantiles_test = quantiles_test
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_frt_residual <- function(fit_ok,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          dharma_uniformity_p,
                                          dharma_dispersion_p,
                                          dharma_outlier_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_p,
                                          dharma_quantiles_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_warning,
                                          dharma_quantiles_warning,
                                          dharma_categorical_error,
                                          dharma_quantiles_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(
      fit_error,
      fit_warning_text,
      dharma_categorical_warning,
      dharma_quantiles_warning,
      dharma_categorical_error,
      dharma_quantiles_error
    ),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !isTRUE(fit_ok) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_outlier_p) && dharma_outlier_p < 0.05 ~
      "outlier_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_quantiles_p) && dharma_quantiles_p < 0.05 ~
      "quantiles_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("outer Newton did not converge fully|step failure", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "diagnostic_test_warning",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficiency_signal",
    !is.na(fit_warning_text) ~ "warning_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PLOTFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

plot_frt_residuals_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] FRT Residuals vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_frt_residuals_vs_nLetters <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = nLetters, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] FRT Residuals vs nLetters | ", aggr_label),
      x = "nLetters",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_frt_observed_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = observed)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] FRT Observed vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "Observed FRT"
    )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_discourse_particles_frt_residual <- function(df_aggr,
                                                               formula,
                                                               exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                               aggr_i,
                                                               nsim = 2000) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_frt(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  if (is.null(fit_obj)) {
    summary_tbl <- tibble(
      experiment = exp_name,
      aggr_level = aggr_i,
      n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
      n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
      n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
      n_AOI_condition = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$`AOI.condition`),
      formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
      mutate(
        n_obs_residuals = NA_real_,
        residual_mean = NA_real_,
        residual_median = NA_real_,
        residual_sd = NA_real_,
        residual_min = NA_real_,
        residual_max = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_lt_0_05 = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_gt_0_95 = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_fitted = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_nLetters = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_categorical_error = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_error = NA_character_,
        problem_type = "fit_error"
      )

    return(list(
      summary_tbl = summary_tbl,
      simres = NULL,
      plot_data = NULL,
      tests = NULL
    ))
  }

  dharma_res <- analyse_dharma_frt(
    fit_obj = fit_obj,
    df = df_aggr,
    nsim = nsim
  )

  summary_tbl <- tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
    n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
    n_AOI_condition = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$`AOI.condition`),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(dharma_res$residual_summary) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_frt_residual(
        fit_ok = fit_ok,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        dharma_uniformity_p = dharma_uniformity_p,
        dharma_dispersion_p = dharma_dispersion_p,
        dharma_outlier_p = dharma_outlier_p,
        dharma_categorical_p = dharma_categorical_p,
        dharma_quantiles_p = dharma_quantiles_p,
        dharma_categorical_warning = dharma_categorical_warning,
        dharma_quantiles_warning = dharma_quantiles_warning,
        dharma_categorical_error = dharma_categorical_error,
        dharma_quantiles_error = dharma_quantiles_error
      )
    )

  list(
    summary_tbl = summary_tbl,
    simres = dharma_res$simres,
    plot_data = dharma_res$plot_data,
    tests = dharma_res$tests
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUTOMATISCHE PLOTAUSGABE
# =========================================================

print_all_frt_residual_plots <- function(res_obj) {
  aggr_levels <- names(res_obj$plot_data_list)

  for (i in seq_along(aggr_levels)) {
    aggr_i <- aggr_levels[i]
    plot_data <- res_obj$plot_data_list[[aggr_i]]
    simres <- res_obj$simres_list[[aggr_i]]

    if (is.null(plot_data) || is.null(simres)) next

    print(plot_frt_residuals_vs_fitted(plot_data, aggr_i, 1))
    print(plot_frt_residuals_vs_nLetters(plot_data, aggr_i, 2))
    print(plot_frt_observed_vs_fitted(plot_data, aggr_i, 3))

    graphics::plot(simres)
    graphics::mtext(
      text = paste0("[4/4] Standard DHARMa Plot | ", aggr_i),
      side = 3,
      line = 1,
      cex = 1.1,
      font = 2
    )
  }
}

# =========================================================
# HAUPTFUNKTION
# =========================================================

run_frt_residual_analysis_discourse_particles <- function(df,
                                                          exp_name = "discourse_particles",
                                                          nsim = 2000,
                                                          print_plots = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_discourse_particles_frt_residual_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))
  formula_i <- make_formula_discourse_particles_frt(response = "FRT")

  res_list <- purrr::map(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    fit_one_full_case_discourse_particles_frt_residual(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula = formula_i,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i,
      nsim = nsim
    )
  })

  names(res_list) <- aggr_levels

  residual_summary <- purrr::map_dfr(res_list, "summary_tbl")

  problem_counts <- residual_summary %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- residual_summary %>%
    filter(problem_type != "none") %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  plot_data_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "plot_data")
  simres_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "simres")
  tests_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "tests")

  out <- list(
    residual_summary = residual_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only,
    plot_data_list = plot_data_list,
    simres_list = simres_list,
    tests_list = tests_list,
    raw_results = res_list
  )

  if (isTRUE(print_plots)) {
    print_all_frt_residual_plots(out)
  }

  out
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_frt_residuals <- run_frt_residual_analysis_discourse_particles(
  df = discourse_particles,
  exp_name = "discourse_particles",
  nsim = 2000,
  print_plots = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# TABELLEN
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_frt_residuals$residual_summary)
#round_df_4(res_frt_residuals$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_frt_residuals$problem_fits_only)


knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_frt_residuals$problem_counts),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)

tab <-   round_df_4(res_frt_residuals$residual_summary) %>% select(- formula)


print_split_table <- function(tab, id_cols = 1:3, chunk_size = 6, font_size = 8) {
  id_names <- names(tab)[id_cols]
  other_names <- names(tab)[-id_cols]

  split_index <- ceiling(seq_along(other_names) / chunk_size)
  groups <- split(other_names, split_index)

  for (i in seq_along(groups)) {
    cols_i <- c(id_names, groups[[i]])
    tab_i <- tab[, cols_i, drop = FALSE]

    print(
      knitr::kable(
        tab_i,
        format = "html",
        escape = FALSE
      ) %>%
        kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, font_size = font_size)
    )

    cat("<br><br>")
  }
}
print_split_table(tab)
```
